title: Natural Language Processing
description: Study of computational methods for processing and understanding human language. Covers text preprocessing, language models, word embeddings, sequence models (RNNs, LSTMs), attention mechanisms, transformers, and applications including sentiment analysis, machine translation, question answering, and text generation. Students implement NLP pipelines using Python (NLTK, spaCy, HuggingFace Transformers). CS305 (Machine Learning) is the prerequisite as NLP builds heavily on ML foundations including neural networks, optimization, and model evaluation.
outcomes: Apply word embeddings to NLP tasks
Implement sequence models for text classification
